subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This, Thy servant, hath been enraptured by the fragrant breezes wafted from the resplendent blossoms of the garden of mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک هذا انجذب بنفحات الازهار الساطعه الطیب من حدیقه الاسرار و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
